untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) stop-loss cascade mechanics (not directly observable from price/volume indicators), (2) support/resistance level penetration (requires dynamic SR detection not in allowed indicators), (3) corporate news events (external data not in allowed indicators), (4) macroeconomic news releases (external data not in allowed indicators). The signal is event-driven and context-dependent with author-silent parameters that prevent systematic rule construction. Only volume surge proxy is translatable.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture intraday momentum via volume ratio spike as proxy for stop-loss cascade breakouts. Used RSI reversal for exits as substitute for author-silent exit logic. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original signal. This translation is incomplete without external news/event data and dynamic support-resistance detection.
